feuds:
Margaret Josephs: Long-running feud; Teresa posted a cast photo with Margaret's face scratched out, leading Margaret to text her and take a step back from the friendship
Jennifer Fessler: Teresa is distant and cold toward Jen Fessler, who she feels owes her an apology for siding against her family
Danielle Cabral: Peripheral tension; Teresa referenced in the 'Previously' reel regarding Danielle's behavior and accusations
key_moments:
Referenced in the 'Previously' reel: Teresa accused of saying Danielle's husband is a drug dealer — 'Teresa do you want to tell my husband what you said, I'm a drug dealer'
Margaret reveals Teresa posted a cast photo with Margaret and others' faces scratched out around the People's Choice Award nomination period, which caused their falling out
Other castmates arrive and note the tension in the room when Teresa is present — 'I don't have to sit in a room like this with snakes'
Teresa's name is invoked repeatedly off-screen before she even appears; multiple housewives discuss their status with her before sitting down
talking_points:
Address the scratched-out cast photo post — own it or deny it, but have a clear answer ready
Clarify your current relationship status with Margaret — is the 'step back' permanent or situational?
Respond to Danielle's claim about entitled behavior and the charity party money dispute
Have a prepared statement about why Jen Fessler needs to apologize before you can engage with her
Be ready to discuss the Luis-related 'ex' storyline teased in the Previously reel
confessional_draft: At this point in my life, I'm not going to sit across from people who have attacked my husband and my family and pretend everything is fine — that's not who I am. You either have my back or you don't, and the receipts speak for themselves. I came here today ready to say my truth, and honestly? They should be the ones nervous, not me.

feuds:
Teresa Giudice: Teresa posted a cast photo with Margaret's face scratched out; Margaret texted her and officially stepped back from the friendship
Jennifer Fessler: Accused by Teresa's allies of getting in Jen Fessler's ear and influencing her opinions post-show
key_moments:
Reveals the catalyst for her falling out with Teresa: 'My girlfriend sends me a screenshot of her posting a picture of the cast with our faces scratched out' — after which she texted Teresa and said she was stepping back
Arrives late and is called out: 'You're vicious, goodbye' — Jen Fessler teases her on the phone for being late
States her priority for the reunion: 'I'm not trashing anybody... my priority is who I'm really friends with'
Accused by Teresa's camp of influencing Jen Fessler: 'Margaret got in her ear'
talking_points:
Be clear and specific about the timeline of the falling out with Teresa — the scratched-out photo was the final straw
Address the accusation that you manipulated Jen Fessler's opinion about the season
Define what 'stepping back' from Teresa means — is there a path to reconciliation or is it over?
Maintain your stated position of not adding to the toxicity — but be ready when others push back
Clarify your current alliance structure: who are your genuine friends in the cast?
confessional_draft: I came into this reunion with one goal — no drama, no toxicity, just the truth. But when someone posts a photo with your face scratched out right before you're supposed to have dinner together, you have to ask yourself what kind of friendship that really is. I said what I had to say in that text, and I meant every word.

feuds:
Teresa Giudice: Teresa's allies feel Jen Fessler owes Teresa an apology; Jen has not spoken to Teresa since filming ended
Jennifer Aydin: Jen Aydin called out Fessler for 'riding hard' for Jennifer Aydin during the season and then reversing her position after watching it back
key_moments:
Arrives late to the venue — called by multiple castmates, jokingly scolded: 'I got caught behind the truck... everybody's yelling at me'
Her changed stance is a key talking point before she even walks in: 'She really had her own opinion but now after the show is done and interviews she changed her mind'
Acknowledged by Margaret as someone who 'should apologize' to Margaret regarding Teresa
Her absence during the pre-show mingling means her arrival is treated as an event unto itself
talking_points:
Explain why your position on the Jennifer Aydin fight changed after watching the season back
Address whether Margaret influenced your shift in opinion or if it was purely from watching the footage
Clarify your current relationship with Teresa — have you spoken since filming? Do you plan to apologize?
Be prepared for Jen Aydin to confront you about flip-flopping on who was the aggressor in their fight
Define your role this season — were you an independent voice or were you pulled into someone else's orbit?
confessional_draft: Look, I said what I said during filming based on what I saw in the moment — but once I watched it back, I couldn't in good conscience defend what I defended. That's not flip-flopping, that's called being honest. And if that makes some people uncomfortable, well, welcome to my world.

feuds:
Jennifer Fessler: Aydin confronts Fessler for initially defending the person who physically pushed her, then reversing position after watching the season
Danielle Cabral: Referenced in the Previously reel in connection with the physical altercation — 'Danielle absolutely pushed you'
key_moments:
Arrives and immediately clocks the hostile energy: 'What I felt when I walked in was nothing welcoming'
Directly calls out Jen Fessler for originally defending the opposing side: 'You were riding hard for Jen coming at me'
Receives a surprise concession from Margaret: 'Watching it back I was wrong — Jen absolutely pushed you... I regret defending Jen Aydin in that fight' — a significant vindication moment
Snaps back defensively on arrival: 'I don't have to sit in a room like this with snakes... I can go sit in another room with snakes that are nice'
talking_points:
Accept Margaret's apology gracefully but make clear the damage that was done by not having your back in the moment
Press Jen Fessler on why she needed to watch the season back to believe you — your word should have been enough
Be ready to walk through the physical altercation with Danielle beat by beat
Address the 'snake' comment you made on arrival — was that directed at anyone specifically?
Come prepared with your version of the charity/party money dispute referenced in the Previously reel
confessional_draft: I don't need people to watch footage to know what happened to me — I lived it. The fact that I had to wait for a TV edit to be believed says everything about who had my back and who didn't. But I'm here now, I look good, and I'm ready to set the record straight.

feuds:
Teresa Giudice: Drug dealer accusation circulated on social media attributed to Teresa; Danielle's husband is at the center of it
Jennifer Aydin: Physical altercation during the season — Aydin's camp confirms Danielle pushed her
Margaret Josephs: Danielle reportedly developed a problem with Margaret mid-season/during press despite no on-screen incident between them — 'Nothing ever happened with the two of us'
key_moments:
Featured heavily in the Previously reel: Teresa accused of telling others Danielle's husband is a 'drug dealer' — Danielle confronts Teresa about it on camera
Described in the Previously reel as having an 'entitled elitist type of personality' regarding her party/charity money
Margaret states Danielle never explained her beef with Margaret directly: 'No, and after watching the season nothing ever happened with the two of us'
The physical push of Jennifer Aydin — confirmed on tape and acknowledged by Margaret at the reunion
talking_points:
Address the drug dealer rumor head-on — what evidence do you have it came from Teresa, and what impact did it have on your family?
Respond to the 'entitled elitist' characterization and the charity party money accusation
Own or explain the physical altercation with Jennifer Aydin — the footage is damning
Explain why you developed a problem with Margaret during press when nothing happened between you two on screen
Clarify your current relationship with Teresa — are you seeking accountability or a resolution?
confessional_draft: When someone goes out and tells people your husband is a drug dealer, that's not a petty Housewives argument — that's an attack on my family's livelihood and reputation. I didn't come on this show for that, and I am not going to sit here and let it be swept under the rug. Someone needs to answer for it.
